violations.text: Milk was observed held at 61-65 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Milk was observed held at 63-71 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
